_salaryNote: Optional salary filter — remove or omit any of these to disable:
_locationNote: Optional location allowlist — omit to include all locations. 'United States', 'USA', and 'US' are smart aliases that also match US state abbreviations (e.g. 'San Francisco, CA'). Add 'Remote' to also include jobs with no country specified:
_hackernewsNote: Set to true to include recent YC/startup job posts from Hacker News (no API key needed):
_companiesAlternative: Or pick specific companies by ID from boards.json:
